mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, ai_mood_code, ai_strength_code, create_time, update_time, is_valid FROM ai_mood_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_valid = 1
ORDER BY ai_mood_code DESC, create_time LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_mood_config SET ai_mood_code = #{aiMoodCode}, ai_strength_code = #{aiStrengthCode}, is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE ai_mood_config SET is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE ai_mood_config SET is_valid = #{isValid}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, ai_mood_code, ai_strength_code, create_time, update_time, is_valid FROM ai_mood_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
